arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim 'urges Man United stars to use Luke Littler as inspiration' ahead of Liverpool clash at Anfield in 'stirring speech'
arts.sum: United face the daunting task of trying to stun the title favourites after a run of five defeats in their last six league games.

arts.ttl: I left Liverpool and joined Man Utd – going back to Anfield made me feel sick
arts.sum: Former Manchester United and Liverpool striker Michael Owen has opened up on the conflicting emotions he felt when representing the Red Devils against the club of his youth

arts.ttl: Manchester United XI vs Liverpool – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United make the trip to Liverpool on Sunday looking to avoid their worst run of results in 63 years. Ruben Amorim’s team have lost three consecutive league games and the Red Devils last lost four in a row in 1961. arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp's unwanted Liverpool first as Arne Slot warned over Man Utd's last Anfield win
arts.sum: LIVERPOOL vs MAN UTD: A LOOK BACK - Jurgen Klopp was beaten by Manchester United the first time he ever welcomed them as Liverpool manager - Arne Slot will be determined not to preside over a repeat at Anfield

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Manchester United – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: English football’s most successful clubs go to battle today as Liverpool host Manchester United. Sunday’s hosts are five points clear at the top of the Premier League table, with two games in hand over nearest challengers Arsenal. arts.ttl: 'We spoke' - Former Liverpool boss snubbed Manchester United twice after David Moyes sacking
arts.sum: Jurgen Klopp built a formidable reputation at Liverpool, but he could have been in the home dugout at Old Trafford rather than the away one if he had followed his head

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Man Utd clash under threat as urgent safety meeting held over severe snow
arts.sum: Snow has battered Merseyside overnight, as well as the main travel routes towards Liverpool from Manchester, causing Liverpool City Council to consider whether the game should be called off

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Man Utd postponement latest LIVE as severe snow forces emergency meeting
arts.sum: Liverpool are due to take on Manchester United in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon, but severe snow has hit Merseyside overnight causing the match to be placed under threat

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted to hit new low as Liverpool clash spells trouble for Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Table-topping Liverpool welcome crisis-ridden Manchester United to Anfield on Sunday, with a massive 23 points and 13 places separating the two Premier League giants

arts.ttl: 'I hate going back to Liverpool after leaving and joining Man Utd – it makes me feel sick'
arts.sum: Michael Owen kicked off his footballing career with Liverpool but also represented their fierce rivals in Manchester United in his later days – and he admits returning to Anfield makes him nauseous
